text.p: I thank you very greatly for your mail dated 21st November. I was happy to have the mail first that I now have your e-mail address and as such, I can get in touch with you any time I wish which is a good thing. We are fine here and the baby is also kicking fine too. has now fully had his HND Higher National Diploma as he was here some three days ago to show the statement of result as well as well as the exemption certificate from the NYSC National Youth Service Corps authority; It is a thing of joy as one was not expecting it. I hope he will continue to do well.
How are the children and their studies ? God will continue to pilot them aright all through their lives.

It has been a long time that we exchanged mails last. But I am happy that it is not long since we spoke on phone. How is your programme ? I am sure that you are enjoying every bit of it including the bitingly cole weatgher which, I am told, has gone down with normalcy taking place. We thank God for everything.

I have also sent a mail to intimating her with 's JAMB Joint Admission and Matriculation Board result and the choice of Course. I know that you are3 both far from home, but that notwithstanding, the graced given unto you both can still be exploited. Therefore, whatever you can do for us do
We are fine here and everybody send his/her greetings to you all.

I have just read your mail. I was not able to go through the mail yesterday because of other commitments. I was very happy to have the report that the books eventually got to you. I nurse fear whenever I have anything to do with our Post Office. We thank God that the system is gradually improving. We shall eventually get to our destination in this country. He is always on the throne !

I sent a text to you this morning. The network could not allow it to go yesterday. You must have got it by now. On , I have not been chanced to go to her house this few weeks and her phone too, is off most of the time. In any case, Schools have resumed here after the Christmas holidays and she has started going to School. We should not relent in our prayers for her total recovery. I will not want you to bother about . He is a case by himself. All he knows how to do is raise alarm with himself standing aloof -- not caring to contribute anything to the healing process. Any way, we have cause to thank God on him. At least he is now working. It means that it will not be everything on the wife alone.

We are fine here. However, rthe problem we are facing is that we are all alone as left before the middle of December and we are yet to secure anyone. We were at some four days ago, but there too, we are still expecting from Sunday who secured for us last year. We have trust in God.
This year's Universal week of Prayers started on Monday, 5th and will end tomorrow Saturday, 10th We continue to pray for our entire family and surely God will hear us.
Greetings, most sincere, to all of you.
